issue.title: Missed combination of sub+and
issue.body:
I've found a case of `sub+and+sub` which can be combined into single `and`.

```llvm
define i64 @src(i64 %0) {
  %2 = sub nuw i64 71, %0
  %3 = and i64 %2, -8
  %4 = sub i64 64, %3
  ret i64 %4
}

define i64 @tgt(i64 %0) {
  %2 = and i64 %0, 120
  ret i64 %2
}
```
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/MrCTxL
issue.author: chfast

comments.author: RKSimon
comments.body: Any chance that you can generalize this further?
